top_signals.title: Training Maestro Size set for profitable Sunday at Sha Tin
top_signals.summary: 13-TIME champion trainer John Size could be the man to follow when racing gets underway with an 11-race programme, including a couple of Group Three contests at Sha Tin in Hong Kong on Sunday.
